    descriptionAF Transmission: "The Graven stronghold in Arrenius has been the central node for an underground weapons cartel. We need you to eliminate the Elite Gunners and Elite Lanchers so that we can infiltrate it."
    value12

    dropJebQvxhDpUuTv0IOfiNEZQ

    addedEnemies["CkHLuiRic0ml1fNO4quoBw","bWrrjw3Oz0SsLDbNwNNOhQ"]
    completeDescriptionAF Transmission: "It looks like we have found a few interesting things while you attacked Graven. Apparently the weapons are transported via Kapello. Its probably the supply line for all enemy strongholds in the Antor system. We need to put at stop to it."
    majorTypestatic
